description:
Job Description
The Analyst Programmer is responsible for developing and maintaining business-critical data solutions using SQL, Python, and cloud technologies. This role plays a key part in automating processes, managing data across systems, and supporting ERP/SCM platforms to improve business operations.
Key Responsibilities:
Design, develop, and maintain SQL databases and SSRS reports to support business needs.
Implement data virtualization solutions to integrate and manage data from multiple sources.
Develop and deploy applications on cloud platforms, including low-code platform development and support.
Troubleshoot and resolve technical issues related to business applications and systems.
Collaborate with cross-functional teams to gather requirements and deliver solutions that meet business objectives.
Stay updated with the latest industry trends and technologies to continuously improve our systems and processes.
Basic network and end users Laptop/Desktop computing support
M365 Users and Devices administrative tasks
Qualifications:
Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, or a related field.
Strong proficiency in SQL, SSRS, and Python.
Experience with data virtualization tools and techniques such as Power BI or Tableau.
Experience with cloud data platforms, automation and AI will be advanced
Knowledge of ERP and SCM systems, with experience in Exact being a plus.
Excellent problem-solving skills and attention to detail.
Strong communication and collaboration skills.
Ability to work independently and as part of a team.
Basic network infrastructure support and setup
Familiar with M365 administration
Proficient in speaking and writing English, Malay, and Mandarin
Ability to work independently and as part of a team.
